title: dortmanna engelmanniana
intro: Dortmanna engelmanniana, also known as Engelmann's dune tansy or Engelmann's tansy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Dortmanna engelmanniana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, and its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna engelmanniana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oils in aromatherapy.
